title: Unbeetable Creepers
description: This mod endows creepers with the ability to morph into bees 🐝
body:
## Disclaimer
The mod is in the alpha stage and may cause crashes and unpredictable behaviour. Exercise caution and consider backing up your world before installation.

## Description

Have you ever wondered what would happen if creepers could fly? Bee-hold, **Unbeetable Creepers**!
This mod makes sweetie pie creepers able to fend for themselves by morphing into bees.


<details>
<summary>Morph conditions</summary>

- Player is too high up
- Player is in creeper's approach range and hasn't seen it for the last few seconds
- Creeper received too much damage
- Creeper was attacked (with some chance)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Bee-haviour variance</summary>

Beeper's behavior depends on his 'annoyance', which can change depending on the player's actions, like fleeing, chasing, ignoring, etc.

### States
- Annoy: Beeper would approach a player from behind and annoy by making fuse sounds
- Scare: Beeper would approach a player from behind and wait until it turns back to start fusing
- Kill: Beeper would approach a player from behind and try to explode as soon as he gets close enough
- Rage: Beeper would speed up and charge into a player

</details>
